topStories.title: Oil Windfall: How Saudi, Russian And US Suppliers Drew Up To $30M/Hour Amid Iran Conflict
topStories.description: The world's top 100 energy firms raked in nearly $23 billion in additional profits during March, as crude prices climbed over $100 per barrel.

topStories.description: Beijing calls for protecting Iran's sovereignty and ensuring safe navigation through the Strait of Hormuz, Xinhua reports

topStories.title: Is Iran beating the US at its own propaganda game?
topStories.description: Iran has condemned a ban imposed by YouTube on a pro-Iranian group that releases Lego-style AI videos.

topStories.title: Trade Setup: Nifty Resistance Moves To 24,400 As Markets Rebound On US-Iran Truce Hopes
topStories.description: Breaching the resistance zone will allow the benchmark index to move to around 24,550 levels, analysts said.

topStories.description: CENTCOM says nine vessels turned back after complying with US directions near Iranian waters

topStories.title: What led to American YouTuber Johnny Somali’s six-month jail sentence in South Korea?
topStories.description: Johnny Somali was charged with four counts of interference with business, two counts under the Minor Crimes Act, and two counts related to sexual violence offences.

topStories.title: Pakistan's Asim Munir in Iran for peace talks as Trump says war 'close to over'
topStories.description: The Inter Services Public Relations, the media wing of the military, confirmed Pakistan Army Chief Asim Munir's arrival in a statement, saying that Munir is part of a delegation that also includes Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi.

dailyNews.title: Mark Mobius, emerging markets investing pioneer and Franklin Templeton veteran, passes away at 89
dailyNews.description: Mobius spent over three decades with Franklin Templeton Investments, where he became a leading advocate for investing in developing economies across Asia, Africa, Latin America, and Eastern Europe.

dailyNews.description: The US is sending additional troops to the Middle East this month, according to The Washington Post.

dailyNews.title: Iranian delegation faced threats, altered route mid-flight after failed talks with US in Islamabad: Report
dailyNews.description: Political analyst Mohammad Marandi says Iran’s Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi and Parliamentary Speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf were forced to alter their travel plans mid-flight, eventually completing their journey via bus and train.

dailyNews.title: Debt Alarms Ring as Countries Rack Up More Emergency Spending
dailyNews.description: Amid signs of a prolonged period of high energy costs, policymakers are urging restraint as governments open up the public till to protect households and businesses.

dailyNews.title: Stocks Approach Record High as Wall St. Looks Beyond War
dailyNews.description: Investors appear to be treating an end to the U.S.-Israeli war with Iran as a foregone conclusion.

dailyNews.description: Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni was once considered one of President Trump’s closest European allies. Their friendship now appears in danger.

dailyNews.title: Vance Says Pope Leo Should Be More Careful When Talking About Theology
dailyNews.description: The vice president, who is Catholic, took issue with Pope Leo XIV’s statement that disciples of Christ are “never on the side of those who once wielded the sword and today drop bombs.”

dailyNews.title: Trump Increased Tax Refunds, but a Political Challenge Still Looms
dailyNews.description: While last year’s tax law has raised the average I.R.S. refund, the boost is less than the White House expected — and may not have much impact on voters.

dailyNews.title: Trump reveals he has multi-pick SCOTUS plan ready as retirement speculation heats up
dailyNews.description: President Trump says he is prepared to appoint up to three Supreme Court justices as speculation swirls around Justice Alito's possible retirement.

dailyNews.title: WATCH: Ex-NATO chief draws red line as Trump fumes alliance abandoned US during Iran war
dailyNews.description: Former NATO chief Jens Stoltenberg says the alliance should not be drawn into supporting U.S. military operations against Iran, calling NATO defensive.

dailyNews.title: David Axelrod trying to tamp down speculation after meeting the pope
dailyNews.description: David Axelrod denies his Pope Leo XIV meeting was a precursor to a potential summit with former President Barack Obama amid accusations of politically motivated Trump criticism.

dailyNews.title: Over a dozen state officials rally behind game-changing Trump admin rule cracking down on fraud: 'Essential'
dailyNews.description: Financial officers from 12 states rally behind a Trump administration rule targeting healthcare middlemen to lower costs and root out fraud and waste.

dailyNews.title: ‘Privileged’ Hunter Biden, spared by dad’s pardon, blasts Trump’s clemency power
dailyNews.description: Hunter Biden admits his own bias regarding the presidential pardon from his father, claiming the founders never imagined Donald Trump or his family.

dailyNews.title: Why Jerome Powell — not Trump — will decide when the Fed chief steps down
dailyNews.description: President Trump would love to be finally rid of Fed Chair Jerome Powell. But firing him would kick up a legal firestorm and roil financial markets, experts said.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran war "close to over" amid push for new peace talks
dailyNews.description: With the Iran war paused halfway through a 2-week ceasefire, President Trump is again voicing optimism over the potential for a deal to end it for good.

dailyNews.title: Watch: Bessent, Loeffler and Leavitt take questions on inflation, Iran and more at briefing
dailyNews.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, Small Business Administration administrator Kelly Loeffler and White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt spoke to reporters Wednesday about a wide range of issues at the White House press briefing. CBS News political reporter Zak Hudak provided analysis following the news conference.

dailyNews.title: Leavitt discusses "Arc de Trump" at White House briefing
dailyNews.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt spoke about President Trump's proposed triumphal arch near Arlington National Cemetery on Wednesday. See her remarks.

dailyNews.title: Watch: Mike Waltz says Trump's threat to end Iran's civilization helped engage regime
dailyNews.description: Mike Waltz, the U.S. ambassador to the United Nations, testified before the Senate Committee on Foreign Relations and said President Trump's threat to end Iran's civilization helped engage Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump says China agrees not to send weapons to Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump said Wednesday that China has agreed not to send weapons to Iran amid reports that Beijing considered making a transfer. CBS News' Zak Hudak and Elizabeth Palmer have more.
